extract: Inteleon (Japanese: インテレオン Intereon) is a Water-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. It evolves from Drizzile starting at level 35. It is the final form of Sobble. Inteleon can Gigantamax into Gigantamax Inteleon if it has the Gigantamax Factor. Gigantamax Inteleon was introduced in The Isle of Armor.
